short_description: Independent advice and read-only PR reviews for local Codex workflows.
long_description: Second Opinion by AmanERP gives Codex users a bounded independent advisory or adversarial pull-request review through their separately installed and authenticated Claude Code CLI. Deep and critical work uses a verified Opus answering model; Sonnet is an explicitly acknowledged standard option and never an automatic fallback. Every run is explicit, read-only, tool-free, resource-bounded, schema-validated, and recorded in local provenance artifacts. AmanERP does not proxy or receive prompts, diffs, credentials, or responses.
starter_prompts: Use $independent-advisory to obtain a second opinion on this decision.
Use $independent-pr-review to adversarially review this pull request.
Use $independent-pr-review to review this supplied diff without changing files.

requirements: Claude Code 2.1.209 or newer, installed and authenticated by the user
GitHub CLI 2.x only for GitHub pull-request mode

availability_note: Immediately before submission, confirm that OpenAI Plugins and Claude Code are both available in every selected country and that AmanERP support and legal coverage are ready there.
non_affiliation_notice: Second Opinion by AmanERP is an independent open-source project. AmanERP is not affiliated with or endorsed by Anthropic. Claude and Claude Code are trademarks of Anthropic PBC.
data_flow_summary: User-selected content is sent directly from the user's workstation to Anthropic through the user's Claude Code authentication. AmanERP operates no proxy and receives no plugin inputs, credentials, or model outputs. Reports remain local unless the user independently shares them.
